request.summary: Set up the Ontology Vault Branching proof as a complete Arcanum ontology harness package.
request.intent: Add the missing run report, inventory, context retrieval proof, and observability telemetry around the branch-aware ontology proof.

execution.notes: Branch-aware proof already had source vault and ontology outputs; this run added harness-level setup around them.

workflow_gaps.summary: Proof had generated ontology artifacts but no proof-local telemetry before this run.
workflow_gaps.evidence: No .arcanum observability package existed in the proof folder.
